title: Nutty Silky Kenyan Hazlenuts Stir-fry
description: A delicious monsoon dish featuring roasted hazelnuts in a silky sauce that’s low-sodium and ready to enjoy as a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (such as parsley or cilantro)

instructions: Spread the hazelnuts on a baking sheet and toast them for about 8-10 minutes, until they’re golden brown. Allow them to cool before mincing.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and onion, stirring occasionally until soft and translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add finely chopped red chili pepper and continue cooking for another minute.
Stir in toasted hazelnuts and tamari sauce, then add chicken broth and water. Simmer gently for a couple of minutes to allow flavors to meld together.
Finish with fresh herbs just before serving.
